---
title: "Coverage Map"
page-layout: full
---

<span class="coverage-map-label">First Responder Presumptive Laws — Coverage Map</span>

<div class="loading-notice" id="loading-notice">First visit? This app runs entirely in your browser — it may take up to a minute to initialize while R packages load in the background.</div>

::: {.coverage-map-frame}
<iframe
  id="coverage-map-frame"
  src="app/index.html"
  style="width:100%; height:1100px; border:none; display:block;"
  title="First Responder Presumptive Laws Coverage Map">
</iframe>
:::

<script>
(function () {
  var notice = document.getElementById('loading-notice');
  if (localStorage.getItem('coverageMapLoaded')) {
    notice.style.display = 'none';
    return;
  }
  document.getElementById('coverage-map-frame').addEventListener('load', function () {
    setTimeout(function () {
      localStorage.setItem('coverageMapLoaded', '1');
      notice.style.transition = 'opacity 0.6s ease';
      notice.style.opacity = '0';
      setTimeout(function () { notice.style.display = 'none'; }, 650);
    }, 8000);
  });
})();
</script>
